untranslatable_reason: Signal requires Point-and-Figure chart-specific logic: tracking 'boxes', 'highest box containing an X', 'lowest box containing an O', and box-height comparisons. These are proprietary P&F column state metrics not available in standard OHLCV indicator library. The [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] parameter is undefined and requires manual specification of box size in P&F scale. Standard price bars cannot directly implement P&F reversal and column tracking rules.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_5 is a Point-and-Figure pattern signal requiring chart construction state (column type, box counts, reversal thresholds). Simplified to basic high/low reversals, but this loses the multi-box threshold logic and O/X column state tracking essential to the original rule. Recommend implementing as custom P&F backtest module rather than generic price condition rules.
